description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image with a global before_script that runs python -V, installs virtualenv, creates a venv, and activates it. Enable a pip cache at .cache/pip and cache the venv directory, and set the variable PIP_CACHE_DIR to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache/pip. Add a pages job in the default test stage that installs sphinx and sphinx-rtd-theme, builds the documentation with make html in the doc folder, moves the generated HTML to a public directory, publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch. Add a run job in the default test stage that builds a wheel with python setup.py bdist_wheel, installs the wheel from dist/*, and stores the resulting *.whl file as an artifact. Add a test job in the default test stage that runs python setup.py test, installs tox and flake8, and executes tox -e py36,flake8 for testing and linting.
